name: Tomato Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1 can stewed or diced tomatoes with liquid (14.5 oz.)
40 single soda crackers (saltines) or 20 doubles -- about 4 oz. of crackers -- hand crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the beaten eggs, tomatoes and their liquid, crumbled crackers, and salt.
2. Shape the mixture into four 4-inch pancakes.
3. Heat a small amount of butter in a pan over medium heat.
4. Fry each pancake for about 2 minutes on each side until golden brown.
Makes about 12 (4-in.) pancakes.
